 {"id":"bd-2i9z","title":"E2E Tests: --distribute flag with real bv integration","description":"## Test Coverage
E2E test of ntm send --distribute with real bv and tmux.

## Test Scenario
1. Create workspace with beads + dependencies
2. Spawn agents
3. Run ntm send --distribute
4. Verify bv was called
5. Verify distribution matches bv recommendations
6. Verify prompts sent to correct panes

## Prerequisites
- bv installed and working
- Test workspace with bead graph

## Verification Points
- bv --robot-triage returns recommendations
- Distribution respects priority order
- Correct pane gets correct bead
- Assignment tracking updated

## Logging
- Log bv output
- Log distribution plan
- Log each send operation
- Log final state

## Test File

 {"id":"bd-2ibgg","title":"Task: Write EnsembleManager unit and integration tests","description":"# Task: Write EnsembleManager Unit and Integration Tests

## Location
internal/ensemble/manager_test.go
internal/ensemble/assignment_test.go
internal/ensemble/integration_test.go

## Scope
- Unit + integration tests with **mock tmux / stubbed prompt injection**
- Avoid full CLI/E2E duplication (CLI E2E: bd-3vkzo, full pipeline E2E: bd-18ds7)

## Test Coverage
- Spawn with preset vs explicit modes
- Invalid config errors
- Assignment strategies (round-robin, affinity, explicit)
- State persistence hooks (save/load called)
- Budget caps enforced (per-agent + total)
- OutputCollector integration (schema normalization path)

## Logging Requirements
- Log session names + pane counts
- Log assigned mode IDs/codes per pane
- Log timing per stage (spawn/assign/inject/synthesis)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] >85% code coverage for ensemble package
- [ ] All assignment strategies tested
- [ ] State persistence verified
- [ ] Integration tests run <2s with mocks","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CrimsonEagle","created_at":"2026-01-23T07:36:30.713020626Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-31T20:38:48.684441955Z","closed_at":"2026-01-31T20:38:48.684379819Z","close_reason":"Completed: ensemble coverage 85.5% with added OutputCollector/normalization + misc helper tests; gates pass","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2ibgg","depends_on_id":"bd-25wul","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:48:38Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2ibgg","depends_on_id":"bd-lfwpg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T02:48:38Z","created_by":"import"}]}

 {"id":"bd-2iiv4","title":"Task: Add UBS tool adapter (detect/version/health)","description":"## Overview
Implement a tools adapter for Ultimate Bug Scanner (ubs).

## Responsibilities
- Detect binary (`ubs`)
- Parse version output
- Capabilities: scan, robot_mode (JSON output)
- Health check: `ubs --help` or minimal safe check

## Acceptance Criteria
- Adapter reports installed + version correctly
- Health check returns clear message when ubs missing","notes":"## Testing Requirements
- Unit tests: core logic, error paths, edge cases.
- E2E scripts: full CLI/robot flow with detailed log/slog prefixes (e.g., [E2E-<AREA>]) and include session/agent/bead IDs.
- If structured outputs are affected, assert schema stability + deterministic ordering.
